title: External Audit: AI Audit
objective: Obtain independent assurance over AI governance and risk controls, including lifecycle evidence and operational safeguards.

title: External Audit: Security Audit
objective: Gain independent validation of ISMS and cybersecurity posture (e.g., certification or attestation) to enhance trust and demonstrate control effectiveness.

title: Reporting Channels
objective: Provide safe, accessible, and responsive channels for employees, customers, and users to report risks, incidents, or ethical concerns.

title: Internal Audit: AI Audit
objective: Independently assess AI governance, risk, and control effectiveness—including TEVV evidence, fairness/robustness outcomes, and data governance.

title: Internal Audit: Security Audit
objective: Independently assess ISMS control design and operating effectiveness across technology, process, and organizational domains.

title: Internal Audit
objective: Provide independent assurance on the adequacy and effectiveness of security, privacy, and AI governance controls.

title: Testing
objective: Plan and execute comprehensive functional, security, reliability, and safety tests for systems and AI components to discover defects early and reduce production risk.

title: Evaluation
objective: Evaluate model/system performance, safety, and harms across contexts to ensure effectiveness and acceptable risk in realistic operating conditions.

title: Verification
objective: Verify that implemented systems meet stated requirements, policies, and constraints, and that controls operate as designed.

title: Validation
objective: Confirm the system, as built and operated, achieves its intended use for target users and contexts without introducing unacceptable risk.
